name: Multiplication Overflow
description: Multiplication of two positive values where the result can exceed JavaScript's MAX_SAFE_INTEGER.
smt2Template:
(declare-const {{left}} Int)
(declare-const {{right}} Int)
(declare-const result Int)
(assert (= result (* {{left}} {{right}})))
(assert (> {{left}} 0))
(assert (> {{right}} 0))
(assert (> result 9007199254740991))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: total_cost multiplies quantity by price with no overflow guard
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const qty Int)
(declare-const price Int)
(declare-const total Int)
(assert (= total (* qty price)))
(assert (> qty 0))
(assert (> price 0))
(assert (> total 9007199254740991))
(check-sat)
